hero.tagline: Building stories frame by frame, blending creativity, emotion, and purpose into content designed to connect and inspire.

about.bio: Video Editor & Creative Professional with 4+ years of experience in content creation and post-production. Currently part of the Creative & Production team at **Social Avenue**, creating content that connects brands with their audience.
about.subBio: The job, as I see it: protect the story, respect the rhythm, and cut everything that doesn't earn its frames.

marquee: Creating content that connects brands with their audience

capabilities.title: Editing
capabilities.body: Narrative, commercial and music video editing — structure, pacing and rhythm that serve the story, not the timeline.

capabilities.title: Color
capabilities.body: Grades built in DaVinci Resolve, from clean broadcast-safe looks to heavy filmic treatments that hold up on every screen.

capabilities.title: Motion & Sound
capabilities.body: Title design, speed ramps and seamless VFX in After Effects, with sound design that makes every cut land harder.

contact.intro: Booking edits, grades and full post-production. Tell me about the project, the deadline, and what the footage looks like.
